sections.text: Blog > Congratulations on the Successful Development of PCBWay's 24-Layer, 6-Order Arbitrary Interconnection HDI PCB Congratulations on the Successful Development of PCBWay's 24-Layer, 6-Order Arbitrary Interconnection HDI PCB by: Mia Nov 04,2024 20423 Views 1 Comments Posted in HDI PCB HDI PCB Interposer PCB With the continuous development of the integrated circuit industry, the connections between chips have become increasingly complex. Traditional PCB technology faces limitations in applications with higher frequency and speed requirements. Achieving stable and reliable connections between high-speed and high-density chips has become critically important. Moreover, as the power consumpti...
